title.en: From Ho Chi Minh City to Dreamy Dalat
title.ja: ダラット - 夢のような街

short_description.en: From vibrant Ho Chi Minh City to the cool mountain charm of Da Lat, enjoy culture, colonial beauty, and peaceful landscapes.
short_description.ar: دا لات هي مدينة سياحية شهيرة تقع على هضبة لام فيان بمقاطعة لام دونغ. وعلى ارتفاع حوالي 1500 متر فوق مستوى سطح البحر، يُعرف هذا المكان باسم "مدينة الزهور" و"مدينة الضباب".  هو مكان به 4 مواسم في يوم واحد في فيتنام. طبيعة شاعرية، زهور تتفتح طوال العام، هندسة معمارية فرنسية قديمة. يرجى تجربة معنا
short_description.fr: Da Lat est une ville touristique célèbre située sur le plateau de Lam Vien, province de Lam Dong. Avec une altitude d'environ 1 500 m au-dessus du niveau de la mer, cet endroit est connu comme la « ville des fleurs » et « la ville du brouillard ».  est un endroit avec 4 saisons en 1 jour au Vietnam. Nature poétique, Fleurs épanouies toute l’année, Architecture française ancienne. S'il vous plaît, faites l'expérience avec nous
short_description.zh: 大叻是位于林同省林维恩高原的著名旅游城市。这里海拔约1500m，素有“花城”、“雾城”之称。  越南是一个1天4个季节的地方。诗意的自然，四季鲜花盛开，法式古建筑。请和我们一起体验
short_description.ja: ダラットは、ラムドン省のラムビエン高原に位置する有名な観光都市です。標高約1,500mのこの地は、「花の都」「霧の都」として知られています。  ベトナムの1日の中に四季がある場所です。詩的な自然、一年中咲く花、古代フランスの建築物。ぜひ私たちと一緒に体験してください
short_description.ko: 달랏(Da Lat)은 람동(Lam Dong)성 람비엔(Lam Vien) 고원에 위치한 유명한 관광 도시입니다. 해발 약 1,500m에 달하는 이곳은 '꽃의 도시', '안개의 도시'로 알려져 있다.  베트남은 하루에 4계절이 있는 곳이에요. 시적인 자연, 사시사철 피는 꽃, 고대 프랑스 건축물. 우리와 함께 경험해 보세요
short_description.ms: Da Lat ialah sebuah bandar pelancongan terkenal yang terletak di dataran tinggi Lam Vien, wilayah Lam Dong. Dengan ketinggian kira-kira 1,500m dari aras laut, tempat ini dikenali sebagai "bandar bunga" dan "bandar kabus".  ialah tempat dengan 4 musim dalam 1 hari di Vietnam. Sifat puitis, Bunga mekar sepanjang tahun, Seni bina Perancis Purba. Sila pengalaman bersama kami
short_description.de: Da Lat ist eine berühmte Touristenstadt auf dem Lam Vien-Plateau in der Provinz Lam Dong. Mit einer Höhe von etwa 1.500 m über dem Meeresspiegel ist dieser Ort als „Stadt der Blumen“ und „Nebelstadt“ bekannt.  ist ein Ort mit 4 Jahreszeiten an einem Tag in Vietnam. Poetische Natur, das ganze Jahr über blühende Blumen, antike französische Architektur. Bitte erleben Sie mit uns
short_description.es: Da Lat es una famosa ciudad turística ubicada en la meseta de Lam Vien, provincia de Lam Dong. Con una altitud de unos 1.500 m sobre el nivel del mar, este lugar es conocido como la "ciudad de las flores" y la "ciudad de la niebla".  es un lugar con 4 estaciones en 1 día en Vietnam. Naturaleza poética, Flores que florecen todo el año, Arquitectura francesa antigua. Por favor experimenta con nosotros
short_description.it: Da Lat è una famosa città turistica situata sull'altopiano di Lam Vien, nella provincia di Lam Dong. Con un'altitudine di circa 1.500 m sul livello del mare, questo luogo è conosciuto come la "città dei fiori" e "la città della nebbia".  è un luogo con 4 stagioni in 1 giorno in Vietnam. Natura poetica, fiori che sbocciano tutto l'anno, antica architettura francese. Per favore sperimenta con noi
short_description.ru: Далат – известный туристический город, расположенный на плато Лам Вьен, провинция Лам Донг. Это место, расположенное на высоте около 1500 м над уровнем моря, известно как «город цветов» и «город тумана».  это место, где 4 сезона за 1 день во Вьетнаме. Поэтичная природа, Цветы, цветущие круглый год, Старинная французская архитектура. Пожалуйста, опыт с нами
short_description.nl: Da Lat is een beroemde toeristische stad gelegen op het Lam Vien-plateau, in de provincie Lam Dong. Met een hoogte van ongeveer 1.500 meter boven de zeespiegel staat deze plaats bekend als de "bloemenstad" en "miststad".  is een plaats met 4 seizoenen op 1 dag in Vietnam. Poëtische natuur, bloemen die het hele jaar door bloeien, oude Franse architectuur. Ervaring graag met ons
short_description.pl: Da Lat to znane miasto turystyczne położone na płaskowyżu Lam Vien, w prowincji Lam Dong. Położone na wysokości około 1500 m n.p.m. miejsce to znane jest jako „miasto kwiatów” i „miasto mgły”.  to miejsce, w którym w Wietnamie występują 4 pory roku w 1 dzień. Poetycka natura, Kwiaty kwitnące przez cały rok, Architektura starożytnej Francji. Prosimy o doświadczenie z nami
short_description.da: Da Lat er en berømt turistby beliggende på Lam Vien plateauet, Lam Dong provinsen. Med en højde på omkring 1.500 m over havets overflade er dette sted kendt som "blomsternes by" og "tågebyen".  er et sted med 4 årstider på 1 dag i Vietnam. Poetisk natur, blomster der blomstrer hele året rundt, gammel fransk arkitektur. Oplev venligst med os
short_description.sv: Da Lat är en berömd turiststad som ligger på Lam Vien-platån, Lam Dong-provinsen. Med en höjd på cirka 1 500 m över havet är denna plats känd som "blommornas stad" och "dimstaden".  är en plats med 4 säsonger på 1 dag i Vietnam. Poetisk natur, blommor som blommar året runt, gammal fransk arkitektur. Upplev gärna med oss
short_description.no: Da Lat er en kjent turistby som ligger på Lam Vien-platået, Lam Dong-provinsen. Med en høyde på ca. 1500 meter over havet er dette stedet kjent som "blomstenes by" og "tåkebyen".  er et sted med 4 sesonger på 1 dag i Vietnam. Poetisk natur, blomster som blomstrer hele året, gammel fransk arkitektur. Opplev gjerne med oss

days.title: Ho Chi Minh City Highlights

services.title: We welcome you at the airport and take you to your hotel.
Independence Palace
services.details: The Independence Palace, also known as the Reunification Palace, is one of Ho Chi Minh City’s most important historical landmarks. Once the residence and workplace of the President of South Vietnam, it now stands as a symbol of the country’s reunification and journey toward peace.

services.title: Notre-Dame Cathedral Basilica of Saigon
services.details: The Notre-Dame Cathedral Basilica of Saigon is one of Ho Chi Minh City’s most iconic landmarks — a majestic cathedral in the heart of the historic French Quarter.

services.title: Saigon Central Post Office
services.details: Located beside the Notre-Dame Cathedral Basilica of Saigon, the Saigon Central Post Office is a beautiful example of French colonial architecture. With its grand vaulted ceiling and timeless charm, it remains one of the city’s most iconic landmarks.

services.title: Thien Hau Temple - The Spiritual Gem of Saigon’s Chinatown
services.details: The Thien Hau Temple is one of the oldest and most beautiful Chinese temples in Ho Chi Minh City, located in the heart of the vibrant Cholon district. Filled with intricate carvings, spiral incense coils, and a rich spiritual atmosphere, the temple offers a fascinating glimpse into the city’s Chinese heritage.

days.notes: With an altitude of around 1,500 meters, Đà Lạt is known for its mild climate, poetic landscapes, and charming French colonial architecture. Combined with the vibrant energy and cultural highlights of Ho Chi Minh City, this journey offers a perfect blend of urban discovery and peaceful mountain retreat.

days.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta

services.title: My Tho
services.details: Located just a two-hour drive from Ho Chi Minh City, My Tho is the gateway to the Mekong Delta and the capital of Tien Giang Province. Known for its lush landscapes and peaceful atmosphere, it offers a true glimpse into river life

services.title: Ben Tre
services.details: Well known for its coconut products. Here, you will visit a traditional coconut candy workshop. Then, transfer to a small boat to cruise along peaceful canals shaded by water coconut trees.

days.notes: Connecting the dynamic energy of Ho Chi Minh City with the rustic charm of the Mekong Delta, this journey offers a perfect blend of historic landmarks and authentic river life. From iconic city skyscrapers to peaceful canals and floating markets, experience the vibrant diversity of Southern Vietnam in one unforgettable trip

days.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Cu Chi Tunnels - Ben Thanh Marke
days.notes: This tour offers a powerful contrast between Vietnam’s resilient past and its vibrant modern pulse. Explore the legendary underground network used during the war, then return to the city center to experience the energy of its most famous market. It is the perfect blend of historical discovery, local culture, and world-class street food

days.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Mui Ne

services.title: Red Sand Dunes
services.details: The Red Sand Dunes (Đồi Cát Đỏ), also known as the Golden Sand Dunes, are one of Mui Ne’s most famous natural wonders. While smaller than the White Sand Dunes, they are beloved for their intense color and convenient location near the main tourist strip

services.title: Fairy Stream
services.details: Fairy Stream (Suối Tiên) is one of the most unique natural attractions in Mui Ne, Phan Thiet. Unlike any other stream in Vietnam, it is famous for its vibrant colors and surreal landscape

services.title: Fishing Village
services.details: Mui Ne Fishing Village (Làng Chài Mũi Né) offers a fascinating look into the authentic daily life of local fishermen and is one of the most photographed spots in Phan Thiet

days.notes: Red Sand Dunes - Suoi Tien (Fairy Stream) - Fishing Village

days.title: Mui Ne – Wine Cellar – Transfer To Da Lat

services.title: Wine Cellar
services.details: The RD Wine Castle (Rang Dong Wine Castle) is a unique luxury attraction located within the Sea Links City complex in Mui Ne. It is the first and only castle of its kind in Vietnam, designed to recreate the atmosphere of a sophisticated California winery.

days.notes: The journey from the coastal sands of Mui Ne to the misty highlands of Da Lat offers a breathtaking transition through Southern Vietnam’s diverse landscapes

days.title: Da Lat – Valley Of Love – City Flower Garden – Melinh Coffee

services.title: Valley Of Love
services.details: The Valley of Love is one of Da Lat's most iconic and romantic landmarks, nestled among rolling pine hills and the serene Da Thien Lake. This poetic park features vibrant flower gardens, winding forest paths, and scenic viewpoints, making it an enchanting escape for those looking to immerse themselves in the highland's natural beauty and charm

services.title: City Flower Garden
services.details: The City Flower Garden is the vibrant heart of Da Lat, showcasing a stunning collection of hundreds of floral species, including orchids, hydrangeas, and roses. Located at the end of Xuan Huong Lake, this expansive botanical park features giant flower sculptures and meticulously manicured landscapes. It is a colorful paradise that perfectly illustrates why Da Lat is known as the "City of Eternal Spring

services.title: Melinh Coffee
services.details: Located on the outskirts of Da Lat, Melinh Coffee Garden is famous for its breathtaking 360-degree panoramic views of lush coffee plantations and rolling hills. It is the perfect spot to enjoy authentic Weasel coffee while immersing yourself in the fresh highland air and local culture

days.notes: Explore the best of Da Lat by wandering through the romantic landscapes of the Valley of Love and the vibrant displays of the City Flower Garden. Top off your journey at Melinh Coffee Garden, where you can savor authentic highland coffee while soaking in panoramic views of lush plantations and rolling hills. It is a refreshing blend of natural beauty and local flavors

days.title: Langbiang Mountain – Truc Lam Zen Monastery – Clay Tunnel

services.title: Langbiang Mountain
services.details: Langbiang Mountain, the "Roof of Da Lat," offers stunning panoramic views and a legendary love story. It’s a must-visit for trekking, Jeep rides, and breathtaking highland scenery

services.title: Truc Lam Zen Monastery
services.details: Truc Lam Zen Monastery is a serene hilltop retreat overlooking Tuyen Lam Lake. It features beautiful gardens and traditional architecture, offering a peaceful escape in Da Lat

services.title: Clay Tunnel
services.details: The Clay Tunnel is a unique art park featuring massive sculptures made of red soil. It creatively recreates Da Lat's history and landmarks, making it a fascinating spot for photography

days.notes: Discover the essence of Da Lat through three iconic landmarks: Langbiang Mountain for stunning highland views, Truc Lam Zen Monastery for spiritual peace by the lake, and the Clay Tunnel for unique sculptures depicting the city's history. Together, they offer a perfect mix of nature, culture, and art

days.title: Da Lat – Shopping – Nha Trang – See Off Airport
